Meta.title: PaperMind — Books, distilled.
Meta.description: Upload a book and get a structured summary, mind map, slide deck, and quizzes — powered by AI.

Command.placeholder: Search recent books, navigate, or run a command…

Home.heroSubtitle: Drop a PDF, DOCX, or plain text and get a precise summary, a navigable mind map, a polished slide deck, and three kinds of practice questions — all in minutes.
Home.featureSummaryBody: Map-reduce summarization keeps the through-line of long books intact.
Home.featureMindmapBody: Pan, zoom, add nodes, and refine the structure on a clean canvas.
Home.featurePptxBody: Ten hand-tuned color systems. Picks the right one for your topic.
Home.featureQABody: Multiple-choice, descriptive, and fill-in-the-blank. Up to 20 each.
Home.step1Body: PDF, DOCX, TXT, or Markdown — up to a full book.
Home.step2Body: A two-pass map/reduce pipeline keeps the structure honest.
Home.step3Body: Summary, mind map, deck, or quizzes. Generate any combination.
Home.ctaFooterBody: Local-first, open source, your data never leaves your stack.

Upload.title: Upload a book
Upload.subtitle: PDF, DOCX, TXT, or Markdown. The file is sent directly to your backend — nothing is stored on third parties.
Upload.errorFileType: Unsupported file type. Use PDF, DOCX, TXT, or MD.
Upload.errorEmpty: No text could be extracted from this file.
Upload.errorNetwork: Could not reach the backend. Is it running on the API URL in your env?
Upload.limitsHint: Tip: cleaner PDFs produce better summaries.

Library.title: Recent books
Library.subtitle: Backed by your browser. Jobs are kept in memory by the backend, so a restart clears them.
Library.emptyBody: Upload your first file from the home page.

Job.summarySubtitle: Structured rewrite of the source. Use the tabs above to generate other formats.
Job.notFound: Job not found. Either it has been cleared by a backend restart, or the link is broken.

Mindmap.title: Mind map
Mindmap.subtitle: A visual map of the book's structure. Add, edit, drag, or delete nodes locally.
Mindmap.emptyBody: Generate a structured mind map from the summary. You'll be able to edit it after.
Mindmap.instructionRoot: Double-click empty canvas to add a node.
Mindmap.instructionEdit: Click a node, press Enter to rename, Delete to remove.
Mindmap.instructionDrag: Drag nodes to rearrange the layout.

Presentation.title: Presentation
Presentation.subtitle: A PowerPoint deck built from the summary. Choose a palette or let the model pick.
Presentation.emptyBody: Pick a palette and generate a polished slide deck.

QA.title: Practice questions
QA.subtitle: Three independent generators. Each can produce up to 20 questions.
QA.emptyBody: Generate a question set from the summary.

Common.errorBody: Please try again. If the problem persists, check that the backend is running.

Onboarding.title: Welcome to PaperMind
Onboarding.body: PaperMind turns any book or long document into a study system: structured summary, mind map, slide deck, and practice questions.

Errors.conflict: This action conflicts with the current state
